seo_title: News & Updates | Los Cab Sports Club — Fountain Valley, CA
seo_description: Latest news, club updates, and sport highlights from Los Cab Sports Club in Fountain Valley, CA.
hero_subtitle: Stay current with the latest happenings, program launches, facility improvements, and community highlights at Los Cab.

featured_post.label: Featured Update
featured_post.title: What's New at Los Cab — Winter 2026 Facility Upgrades
featured_post.desc: We're excited to share several major upgrades to your Los Cab experience this winter. From brand-new steam and sauna rooms to a dedicated Pilates studio, we've invested in making your club even better.

highlights.text: ✦ New Steam & Sauna rooms in both locker rooms
✦ The "Cool" Pool — new specialty pool added
✦ New dedicated Pilates Room with reformers
✦ Sol Vida OC Café — now open (soft launch)
